occupation: Senior Sales Representative Bus Stop Infrastructure at Trueform Manufacturing & Technologies Group
headline: Senior Sales Representative , Bus stop infrastructure
summary: An experienced business development manager, or Sales Manager. Resilient, collaborative and focused I can deliver solutions to all your infrastructure projects.

experiences.title: Senior Sales Representative Bus Stop Infrastructure
experiences.description: Responsible for building relationships within local authorities, county and city councils, architects and transport consultants within the bus stop infrastructure sector.

experiences.title: Local Authority Relationship Manager
experiences.description: LADC Highways are Section 38/278 (Highways Act 1980) Agreement specialists, with a focus on achieving compliance of obligations under relevant agreements to resolve the issue of unadopted roads. We believe our compliance solutions bring long-lasting social value to the residents of our valued Local Authority Partners, as adoption of roads brings the lasting effect to those residents of maintenance of the roads, environmental benefits, potential for improved safety measures and highway beautification and more. LA Developer Compliance Limited as part of its mission to provide full faceted solutions is proud to announce it has made a number strategic acquisitions, resulting in LADC Highways gaining over 14 years of expert experience, protocols and systems which it will use to assist its Partner Local Authorities with nil-fee solutions should any Section 38/278 agreement fall into default, no matter the reason.
